creator: deischen@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

A fix has been committed to both -current and -stable.  Tor's 
test program seems to work, but with a smaller file size (I 
don't have 10GB of free disk space to really test it).  I'll 
close out this PR in a week or so, if I don't hear back from Tor.
